title: Youmind 19991 Youmind 19991
prompt: A vibrant mixed-media collage featuring a central illustration of a {argument name="subject" default="smiling woman with dark, wavy hair in a cozy green cable-knit sweater, holding a paintbrush"}. The composition includes a polaroid-style photo of a sunlit art studio, hand-drawn doodles like hearts and stars, and uplifting hand-lettered {argument name="quotes" default="quotes such as 'CULTIVATE YOUR LIGHT' and 'FLOURISH & SHINE.'"} The background consists of {argument name="colors" default="torn notebook paper textures and soft watercolor washes in shades of teal, lavender, and gold"}. A "MANIFESTO" list on a taped-on scrap of paper adds a personal, journal-entry feel to the design, creating an inspiring and creative atmosphere.
